title: Tiger Eye Bracelet with Gold-Tone Rice Chain
short_description: A bold half-and-half bracelet pairing glossy natural Tiger Eye beads with a sleek gold-tone rice link chain — confidence and focus, styled for every day.
body_html:
Add a bold yet elegant touch to your everyday style with the Tiger Eye Bracelet with Rice Chain. One half carries glossy natural Tiger Eye stone beads in rich golden-brown tones; the other flows into a sleek gold-tone elongated rice link chain for a polished, modern finish. It is a design that feels premium on the wrist and meaningful beyond it.

Tiger Eye Energy

Tiger Eye is traditionally associated with confidence, focus, courage, grounding and strong decision-making — a stone for people who want to move through the day with intent.

Design Details

  • Natural Tiger Eye beads: Glossy, polished stone beads with the signature golden-brown chatoyant bands — each bead naturally unique.
  • Gold-tone rice link chain: Elongated bar links that give the bracelet a sleek, contemporary half-chain silhouette.
  • Adjustable closure: Secure lobster clasp with an extension chain for a comfortable fit on most wrists.
  • Unisex styling: Balanced enough for men and women, casual outfits and festive looks alike.

Why You'll Love It

  • Stylish everyday bracelet with a premium, unisex design
  • Elegant mix of natural stone beads and gold-tone chain
  • Pairs effortlessly with both casual and festive outfits
  • Adjustable fit — no sizing guesswork
  • Ideal for gifting

Specifications

  • Net Quantity: 1 Bracelet
  • Main Stone: Tiger Eye
  • Chain Type: Gold-tone elongated rice link chain
  • Closure: Lobster clasp with extension chain
  • Fit: Adjustable
  • Finish: Glossy and polished
  • Suitable For: Men & Women
seo_title: Tiger Eye Bracelet with Gold-Tone Rice Chain | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Natural Tiger Eye bead bracelet with a sleek gold-tone rice link chain. Adjustable unisex fit for confidence, focus and everyday style. COD available.

metafields.highlights: Natural Tiger Eye beads · Gold-tone rice link chain · Adjustable lobster clasp with extension · Unisex everyday design
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Natural Tiger Eye stone beads with gold-tone alloy rice link chain, lobster clasp and extension chain; glossy polished finish.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a dry pouch to retain shine.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Is the Tiger Eye stone natural?
faqs.a: Yes. The bracelet uses natural Tiger Eye beads, so the golden-brown bands and shading vary slightly from piece to piece — no two bracelets are exactly alike.
Yes. It closes with a lobster clasp and an extension chain, so you can adjust the length for a comfortable, secure fit on most wrist sizes.

faqs.q: Can both men and women wear this bracelet?
faqs.a: Absolutely. The mix of stone beads and a sleek gold-tone chain is designed as a unisex piece that works for both casual and festive styling.

faqs.q: What is Tiger Eye believed to do?
faqs.a: Tiger Eye is traditionally associated with confidence, focus, courage and grounding — many wear it as a daily reminder to stay steady and decisive.

faqs.q: How do I care for the bracelet?
faqs.a: Avoid water, perfumes and harsh chemicals. Wipe it with a soft dry cloth after wear and store it in a dry pouch to keep the beads and chain glossy.
Yes, COD is available. Orders ship within 24 hours and shipping is free on orders above ₹499.
